task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from a full S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket-name/path/to/object') and extract only the bucket name
solution_criteria: The regex should correctly extract bucket names from various S3 URI formats, handle hyphens and numbers in bucket names, and not match invalid characters

task: Create a Python function that validates an AWS IAM role ARN format and returns True if valid, False otherwise. ARN format: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
solution_criteria: The function should validate the ARN structure, ensure account-id is 12 digits, verify role-name contains only alphanumeric characters and hyphens, and handle edge cases

task: Generate a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda environment variables setup that includes database connection details (host, port, username) and feature flags (debug_mode, enable_logging)
solution_criteria: The JSON should have proper structure with nested objects, use appropriate data types for each variable, include placeholder values that follow AWS naming conventions, and be valid JSON
